mapper.select: SELECT RTR_DT AS rtrDt, BRC AS brc, NAME AS name, BRNM AS brnm FROM mhdb.TB_INSA_MST WHERE ENO = #{eno} LIMIT 1

SELECT U.USER_ID AS userId, U.USER_CD AS userCd, U.USER_NM AS userNm, U.PASSWORD AS password, U.APPROWAITCNT AS approwaitcnt, U.PICTURE AS picture, G.USER_GRP_ID AS userGrpId, U.LOGIN_DATE AS loginDate, U.BRC AS brc, U.BRNM AS brnm, U.USE_YN AS useYn, U.IP_ADDRESS AS ipAddress, U.EXPIRE_DATE AS expireDate FROM mhdb.TB_USER_INFO U, mhdb.TB_USER_MEMBER G WHERE G.USER_ID = U.USER_ID AND U.USER_CD = #{userCd} LIMIT 1
SELECT approval_line_user_id FROM mhdb.TB_APPROVAL_LINE WHERE APPROVAL_LINE_USER_ID = #{userCd} AND APPROVAL_YN IS NULL AND BEFORE_APPLY_YN = 'Y' LIMIT 1
